creator: val@packett.cool
text:
If it works, it works. None of us working on porting the driver have studied all the deep internal AMD magic in detail — only when something doesn't work :)

> it looks like it is trying to find something in build directory structure

No, no one is trying to "find" anything, this is just the line of code the assertion came from. The path is recorded when building, so it's the path that was there in poudriere. This is just how logging works.
